0.text: Calcified pleural plaques in both hemithoraces measuring up to 9 mm at the thickest point in the right costal pleura

1.text: Bronchiectasis in both lungs, most prominently in the upper lobe of the right lung

2.text: Minimal peribronchial thickening in both lungs

4.text: Subcentimeter nodules, most of which are calcified, in both lungs
